properties.content: BM25 is a keyword-based search method useful for exact terms, technical names and categories.
properties.title: BM25 Keyword Search

properties.content: Generative search retrieves relevant objects and sends them to a language model to produce an answer.
properties.title: Generative Search
Vector Search
properties.content: Vector search finds semantically similar objects by comparing embeddings in vector space.
Focused RAG works best when the collection contains clean chunks from relevant notebooks and Markdown concept notes.
properties.title: Focused RAG
Cross-References
properties.content: Cross-references connect objects between collections using reference properties.

properties.title: Multi-Tenancy
properties.content: Multi-tenancy isolates data for different customers, users or organizations inside one shared collection schema.
Deterministic UUIDs and upsert logic help avoid duplicate objects during repeated imports.
properties.title: Idempotent Imports
Hybrid Search
properties.content: Hybrid search combines vector search and BM25. The alpha parameter controls the balance between semantic and keyword ranking.
Named vectors allow one object to have multiple vector representations such as title_vector and description_vector.
properties.title: Named Vectors

properties.content: Weaviate Cloud uses a cluster URL and a Weaviate API key. Provider headers such as the OpenAI API key are used for vectorization and generation.
properties.title: Weaviate Cloud Authentication
